positive: A minimalist, abstract, and aesthetically pleasing illustration of a sprawling galaxy and celestial bodies (planets, nebulae, constellations). The composition features a central, brightly glowing nexus point connected by delicate, glowing lines to orbiting, stylized planets. The style should be neo-geometric and highly graphic, utilizing deep indigos, electric blues, cosmic purples, and vibrant magenta accents. Focus on strong silhouettes, high contrast between the dark void and the luminous elements, and clean, crisp lines suitable for textile printing. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical to maximize visual impact on apparel. No photorealism; stylized and graphic design is mandatory. Use negative space effectively.
negative: photorealism, messy, grunge, low contrast, blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, messy lines, complex background, noisy, bad anatomy, artifact, extra limbs, poor composition
